scenario.send:
INVITE [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$localHdr] To: [$remoteHdrInitInv] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] INVITE Contact: [$localContact] Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

recv.action: <ereg regexp="<([^>]*)" search_in="hdr" start_line="true" header="Contact:" assign_to="tempRemoteContact"/> <ereg regexp="[^<].*" search_in="var" variable="tempRemoteContact" assign_to="remoteContact" check_it="true" />

scenario.send: PRACK [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat RAck: [$rseq] [$invCseq] INVITE From: [$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] [last_Call-ID:] [routes] CSeq: [$localCseq] PRACK Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

UPDATE [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From:[$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] UPDATE Contact: [$localContact] Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

UPDATE [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From:[$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] UPDATE Contact: [$localContact] Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

recv.action: <ereg regexp="<([^>]*)" search_in="hdr" start_line="true" header="Contact:" assign_to="tempRemoteContact"/> <ereg regexp="[^<].*" search_in="var" variable="tempRemoteContact" assign_to="remoteContact" check_it="true" />

scenario.send: ACK [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] ACK Contact: [$localContact] [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

recv.action: <ereg regexp="<([^>]*)" search_in="hdr" start_line="true" header="Contact:" assign_to="tempRemoteContact"/> <ereg regexp="[^<].*" search_in="var" variable="tempRemoteContact" assign_to="remoteContact" check_it="true" />

scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [$remoteVia] From:[$remoteHdr] To:[$localHdr] Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Cseq:[$remoteCseq] INVITE [last_Call-ID:] Contact: [$localContact] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Call-ID:] [$remoteVia] From:[$remoteHdr] To:[$localHdr] CSeq:[$remoteCseq] INVITE Contact: [$localContact] Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Call-ID:] [$remoteVia] From:[$remoteHdr] To:[$localHdr] CSeq:[$remoteCseq] BYE Contact: [$localContact] Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
